arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool determined to swoop for £42m transfer following development at Man United
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly determined to win the race for the transfer of Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez this summer. This comes as it also looks like Manchester United have cooled their interest in the Hungary international after looking at him in January, according to TEAMtalk.
